image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Space and time aren't separate; they’re one fabric, curved by mass-energy.
Context visual: This concept, called spacetime, is pivotal in understanding relativity.
Escalation visual: Imagine a trampoline, where the surface bends under a heavy ball. That's spacetime reacting to mass.
Evidence visual: Researchers have shown that light bends around massive objects, confirming this interaction.
Payoff visual: Understanding spacetime reveals how gravity works, altering our perception of the universe.
Cta visual: Curious about more science mysteries? Hit that follow button!
